---
title: '2014/01/20 Journal Mon'
date: '2014-01-20T14:50:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6546120942484900399'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140120-journal-mon.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
Mom's Leaving tomorrow and routine will start... not that I had much of one before she came, but I had just started one. Now I'll make sure to follow through with that.<br />
<br />
Today we take it easy and relax.<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling</h4>
Tired and sore from late nights and hard sleep.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Thankful</h4>
Thankful for my new job.... I don't know which new job will materialize but I need a new job and I'm also thankful for my passive income streams.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
